I've owned a lot of products in this category over the years and this ranks somewhere in the middle. The design is sleek and modern which I appreciate. The functionality is mostly good but there are a few quirks that get annoying over time. For example, the power button is in an awkward spot and I keep accidentally pressing it. The battery life claims are also a bit optimistic — I get about 70% of what they advertise. That said, for the sale price I paid, I think it's a fair deal. Just don't expect perfection.

Let me break this down. Pros: fast shipping, nice packaging, intuitive design, good weight and feel, works right out of the box. Cons: the manual is practically useless, the app requires too many permissions, and the warranty registration process is needlessly complicated. Overall I'd give it a 7 out of 10. It does what I need it to do and I think it'll last a reasonable amount of time based on the build quality.
